message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Activity Redirection Sequence Diagram

' Define participants with their process groupings
rectangle "Main process" #LightBlue {
    participant "Hook_StartActivity" as Hook
    participant "VirtualCore" as VC
    participant "VActivityManager" as VAM
}

rectangle "Server process" #LightGreen {
    participant "VActivityManagerService" as VAMS
    participant "VPackageManagerService" as VPMS
    participant "ProviderCaller" as PC
}

rectangle "App Client process" #Gray {
    participant "StubContentProvider" as SCP
}

participant "VRedirectActRequest" as VRAR
participant "VActRedirectResult" as VARes

' Main sequence flow
activate Hook
Hook -> VC: resolveActivityInfo
activate VC
deactivate VC

Hook -> VRAR: new VRedirectActRequest
activate VRAR
VRAR --> Hook: req
deactivate VRAR

Hook -> VAM: redirectTargetActivity
activate VAM
VAM -> VAMS: redirectTargetActivity
activate VAMS

' Server-side processing
VAMS -> VAMS: redirectTargetActivityLocked
activate VAMS
VAMS -> VAMS: startProcessLocked
activate VAMS
VAMS -> VAMS: queryFreeStubForProcess
activate VAMS
deactivate VAMS
VAMS -> VAMS: performStartProcessLocked
activate VAMS
VAMS -> VPMS: querySharedPackages
activate VPMS
VPMS --> VAMS: sharedPackages : List<String>
deactivate VPMS

VAMS -> VPMS: queryContentProviders
activate VPMS
VPMS --> VAMS: providers : List<ProviderInfo>
deactivate VPMS

VAMS -> VPMS: getSharedLibraries
activate VPMS
VPMS --> VAMS: usesLibraries : List<String>
deactivate VPMS

VAMS -> PC: call(MethodConstants.INIT_PROCESS)
activate PC
PC -> SCP: call
activate SCP
SCP -> SCP: initProcess
activate SCP
deactivate SCP
deactivate SCP
deactivate PC

note right of SCP: StubContentProvider.java中定义了20个静态内部类C1到C20，都\n是StubContentProvider的子类。并且在AndroidManifest.xml\n中声明了process字段，与对应的StubActivity一致。\nVA的服务进程取出一个空的stubContentProvider，\n借助Android ContentProvider机制，系统会创建一个新进程出来，\n稍后被作为双开应用的容身之所。这个偷梁换柱的过程由VA服务进程完成。

VAMS -> VAMS: fetchStubActivityInfo
activate VAMS
deactivate VAMS
deactivate VAMS
deactivate VAM

VAMS --> VARes: result = new VActRedirectResult
activate VARes
deactivate VARes
deactivate Hook

@enduml
```
